changes.value:
## What Refactor `kanban-app/ui/src/components/column-view.tsx` to render `DropZone` components between cards instead of computing insert indices from mouse Y positions. ### Current flow (delete) 1. `computeInsertIndex()` — compares clientY to card midpoints → index 2. `insertAtIndex` state → renders a colored bar at that index 3. `handleDrop` passes index to parent's `onDrop(columnId, taskData, insertIndex)` ### New flow (replace with) 1. `computeDropZones(taskIds, columnId, boardPath)` called at render time → zone descriptors 2. `DropZone` components rendered between each card 3. Each zone handles its own dragover/drop events 4. Zone's `onDrop` fires with its preconfigured descriptor → parent handles move ### Layout change ``` Before: After:
{insertBar at index} {insertBar at end}
``` ### Props interface changes - Remove: `insertAtIndex`, `onDragOver` (insert index callback) - Keep: `onDrop` but change signature from `(columnId, taskData, insertIndex)` to `(descriptor, taskData)` - Keep: `isDragTarget`, `containerRef`, auto-scroll (still needed for long columns) - Add: `dragTaskId` — passed through to DropZones for no-op hiding - Add: `boardPath` — needed by `computeDropZones` ### What to delete - `computeInsertIndex()` function (lines 53-61) - `localInsert` state - `insertAtIndex` prop - The midpoint-based `handleDragOver` callback - The conditional insertion bar rendering ### Files - **Modify**: `kanban-app/ui/src/components/column-view.tsx` ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] `computeInsertIndex` function is deleted - [ ] DropZones render between every pair of cards + at top and bottom - [ ] Column auto-scroll during drag still works - [ ] Dashed border on column during drag still works - [ ] No `insertIndex` or midpoint math remains in column-view ## Tests - [ ] `kanban-app/ui/src/components/column-view.test.tsx` — column with 3 tasks renders 4 drop zones - [ ] `kanban-app/ui/src/components/column-view.test.tsx` — drop zones have correct before/after attributes - [ ] `kanban-app/ui/src/components/column-view.test.tsx` — empty column renders 1 drop zone - [ ] `pnpm vitest run src/components/column-view.test.tsx` passes
Wire DropZones into ColumnView — replace midpoint computation

changes.forward_patch:
--- original +++ modified @@ -4,42 +4,56 @@ ### Current flow (delete) 1. `computeInsertIndex()` — compares clientY to card midpoints → index -2. `insertAtIndex` state → renders a colored bar at that index -3. `handleDrop` passes index to parent's `onDrop(columnId, taskData, insertIndex)` +2. `insertAtIndex` / `localInsert` state → renders a colored bar at that index +3. `handleDragOver` — midpoint computation + auto-scroll +4. `handleDragLeave` — clears drag state +5. `handleDrop` — passes index to parent +6. `isDragOver` / `isDragTarget` state — dashed column border ### New flow (replace with) 1. `computeDropZones(taskIds, columnId, boardPath)` called at render time → zone descriptors -2. `DropZone` components rendered between each card -3. Each zone handles its own dragover/drop events +2. `DropZone` components rendered between each card (and one filling the column if empty) +3. Each zone handles its own dragover/drop events — no column-level drag handling 4. Zone's `onDrop` fires with its preconfigured descriptor → parent handles move ### Layout change ``` Before: After: -
- {insertBar at index} - - - - {insertBar at end} -
- -
+
+ isDragTarget border-dashed> + {insertBar at index} + + + + {insertBar at end} +
+ + +Empty column: Empty column: +
+ No tasks +
``` ### Props interface changes -- Remove: `insertAtIndex`, `onDragOver` (insert index callback) -- Keep: `onDrop` but change signature from `(columnId, taskData, insertIndex)` to `(descriptor, taskData)` -- Keep: `isDragTarget`, `containerRef`, auto-scroll (still needed for long columns) -- Add: `dragTaskId` — passed through to DropZones for no-op hiding -- Add: `boardPath` — needed by `computeDropZones` +- **Remove**: `insertAtIndex`, `onDragOver`, `onDragEnter`, `onDragLeave`, `isDragTarget` +- **Change**: `onDrop` signature from `(columnId, taskData, insertIndex)` to `(descriptor, taskData)` +- **Add**: `dragTaskId` — passed to DropZones for no-op hiding +- **Add**: `boardPath` — needed by `computeDropZones` +- **Add**: `dragActive` — passed to DropZones so they expand during any drag +- **Keep**: `containerRef` (for cross-window hit-testing), auto-scroll (DropZones still need scroll when near edges) ### What to delete -- `computeInsertIndex()` function (lines 53-61) -- `localInsert` state -- `insertAtIndex` prop -- The midpoint-based `handleDragOver` callback -- The conditional insertion bar rendering +- `computeInsertIndex()` function +- `localInsert` state, `isDragOver` state +- `insertAtIndex` prop, `isDragTarget` prop +- `handleDragOver`, `handleDragLeave`, `handleDrop` callbacks +- `showDashes` variable and dashed border rendering +- The conditional insertion bar `
` +- The empty column `` placeholder (moved into DropZone empty-column variant) + +### Auto-scroll +Auto-scroll during drag still needed for long columns. Move the scroll-zone logic into the column container's `onDragOver` (lightweight — just checks Y position for scroll edges, no midpoint computation). ### Files - **Modify**: `kanban-app/ui/src/components/column-view.tsx` @@ -46,13 +60,14 @@ ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] `computeInsertIndex` function is deleted +- [ ] No `insertIndex`, `isDragOver`, `isDragTarget`, or dashed border logic remains - [ ] DropZones render between every pair of cards + at top and bottom +- [ ] Empty column renders a single `empty-column` variant DropZone - [ ] Column auto-scroll during drag still works -- [ ] Dashed border on column during drag still works -- [ ] No `insertIndex` or midpoint math remains in column-view +- [ ] No column-level drag event handlers remain (zones handle their own events) ## Tests - [ ] `kanban-app/ui/src/components/column-view.test.tsx` — column with 3 tasks renders 4 drop zones - [ ] `kanban-app/ui/src/components/column-view.test.tsx` — drop zones have correct before/after attributes -- [ ] `kanban-app/ui/src/components/column-view.test.tsx` — empty column renders 1 drop zone +- [ ] `kanban-app/ui/src/components/column-view.test.tsx` — empty column renders 1 drop zone with data-drop-empty - [ ] `pnpm vitest run src/components/column-view.test.tsx` passes \ No newline at end of file
changes.reverse_patch:
--- original +++ modified @@ -4,56 +4,42 @@ ### Current flow (delete) 1. `computeInsertIndex()` — compares clientY to card midpoints → index -2. `insertAtIndex` / `localInsert` state → renders a colored bar at that index -3. `handleDragOver` — midpoint computation + auto-scroll -4. `handleDragLeave` — clears drag state -5. `handleDrop` — passes index to parent -6. `isDragOver` / `isDragTarget` state — dashed column border +2. `insertAtIndex` state → renders a colored bar at that index +3. `handleDrop` passes index to parent's `onDrop(columnId, taskData, insertIndex)` ### New flow (replace with) 1. `computeDropZones(taskIds, columnId, boardPath)` called at render time → zone descriptors -2. `DropZone` components rendered between each card (and one filling the column if empty) -3. Each zone handles its own dragover/drop events — no column-level drag handling +2. `DropZone` components rendered between each card +3. Each zone handles its own dragover/drop events 4. Zone's `onDrop` fires with its preconfigured descriptor → parent handles move ### Layout change ``` Before: After: -
- isDragTarget border-dashed> - {insertBar at index} - - - - {insertBar at end} -
- - -Empty column: Empty column: -
- No tasks -
+
+ {insertBar at index} + + + + {insertBar at end} +
+ +
``` ### Props interface changes -- **Remove**: `insertAtIndex`, `onDragOver`, `onDragEnter`, `onDragLeave`, `isDragTarget` -- **Change**: `onDrop` signature from `(columnId, taskData, insertIndex)` to `(descriptor, taskData)` -- **Add**: `dragTaskId` — passed to DropZones for no-op hiding -- **Add**: `boardPath` — needed by `computeDropZones` -- **Add**: `dragActive` — passed to DropZones so they expand during any drag -- **Keep**: `containerRef` (for cross-window hit-testing), auto-scroll (DropZones still need scroll when near edges) +- Remove: `insertAtIndex`, `onDragOver` (insert index callback) +- Keep: `onDrop` but change signature from `(columnId, taskData, insertIndex)` to `(descriptor, taskData)` +- Keep: `isDragTarget`, `containerRef`, auto-scroll (still needed for long columns) +- Add: `dragTaskId` — passed through to DropZones for no-op hiding +- Add: `boardPath` — needed by `computeDropZones` ### What to delete -- `computeInsertIndex()` function -- `localInsert` state, `isDragOver` state -- `insertAtIndex` prop, `isDragTarget` prop -- `handleDragOver`, `handleDragLeave`, `handleDrop` callbacks -- `showDashes` variable and dashed border rendering -- The conditional insertion bar `
` -- The empty column `` placeholder (moved into DropZone empty-column variant) - -### Auto-scroll -Auto-scroll during drag still needed for long columns. Move the scroll-zone logic into the column container's `onDragOver` (lightweight — just checks Y position for scroll edges, no midpoint computation). +- `computeInsertIndex()` function (lines 53-61) +- `localInsert` state +- `insertAtIndex` prop +- The midpoint-based `handleDragOver` callback +- The conditional insertion bar rendering ### Files - **Modify**: `kanban-app/ui/src/components/column-view.tsx` @@ -60,14 +46,13 @@ ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] `computeInsertIndex` function is deleted -- [ ] No `insertIndex`, `isDragOver`, `isDragTarget`, or dashed border logic remains - [ ] DropZones render between every pair of cards + at top and bottom -- [ ] Empty column renders a single `empty-column` variant DropZone - [ ] Column auto-scroll during drag still works -- [ ] No column-level drag event handlers remain (zones handle their own events) +- [ ] Dashed border on column during drag still works +- [ ] No `insertIndex` or midpoint math remains in column-view ## Tests - [ ] `kanban-app/ui/src/components/column-view.test.tsx` — column with 3 tasks renders 4 drop zones - [ ] `kanban-app/ui/src/components/column-view.test.tsx` — drop zones have correct before/after attributes -- [ ] `kanban-app/ui/src/components/column-view.test.tsx` — empty column renders 1 drop zone with data-drop-empty +- [ ] `kanban-app/ui/src/components/column-view.test.tsx` — empty column renders 1 drop zone - [ ] `pnpm vitest run src/components/column-view.test.tsx` passes \ No newline at end of file
